title: An Act authorizing the town of Ayer to prohibit the use or sale of second-generation anti-coagulant rodenticides

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Sena of Acton and Senator Eldridge, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5563) of Danillo A. Sena (by vote of the town) that the town of Ayer be authorized to prohibit the use or sale of second-generation anti-coagulant rodenticides in said town.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2026 from 01:00 PM-02:00 PM in A-2
